title: Open player-funded bounties store (v1)
description: World-scoped ledger of open player-funded mob bounties, persisted as the single file data/world-state/bounties.json. Each entry is one backer's gold stake on a mob type (identified by its template id), payable to whoever next kills a mob of that type anywhere. Several backers may stake the same mob type (each a separate entry); at most one open entry exists per (backer, mob_template_id) pair. A post debits the stake from the backer, a cancel refunds it, and a payout hands the pooled total to the killer — gold is never created or destroyed. The loader is deliberately defensive: a missing, empty, or malformed file yields no bounties. Absence of this file simply means no bounties are open.

bounties.description: One entry per open backer stake.

backer.description: Username of the player who posted and funds this bounty.

mob_template_id.description: Template id of the mob type the bounty targets.

mob_name.description: Mob type display name captured at post time, used in listings and announcements.

posted_tick.description: Game tick at which the bounty was posted (used to report its age).
